segments.text: When Jesus had finished saying these things, he left Galilee and went into the region of Judea to the other side of the Jordan.
Large crowds followed him, and he healed them there.
Some Pharisees came to him to test him.
Is it lawful for a man to divorce his wife for any and every reason?
segments.speaker: Pharisees

segments.text: He replied,
Haven't you read that at the beginning the Creator 'made them male and female,'
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: and said, 'For this reason a man will leave his father and mother and be united to his wife, and the two will become one flesh'?
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: So they are no longer two, but one flesh. Therefore what God has joined together, let no one separate.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Why then did Moses command that a man give his wife a certificate of divorce and send her away?
segments.speaker: Pharisees

segments.text: Jesus replied,
Moses permitted you to divorce your wives because your hearts were hard. But it was not this way from the beginning.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: I tell you that anyone who divorces his wife, except for sexual immorality, and marries another woman commits adultery.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: If this is the situation between a husband and wife, it is better not to marry.
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: Jesus replied,
Not everyone can accept this word, but only those to whom it has been given.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: For there are eunuchs who were born that way, and there are eunuchs who have been made eunuchs by others—and there are those who choose to live like eunuchs for the sake of the kingdom of heaven. The one who can accept this should accept it.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Then people brought little children to Jesus for him to place his hands on them and pray for them. But the disciples rebuked them.
Let the little children come to me, and do not hinder them, for the kingdom of heaven belongs to such as these.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When he had placed his hands on them, he went on from there.

verses.title: The Rich and the Kingdom of God

segments.text: Just then a man came up to Jesus and asked,
Teacher, what good thing must I do to get eternal life?
segments.speaker: Rich Young Man

segments.text: Jesus replied,
Why do you ask me about what is good? There is only One who is good. If you want to enter life, keep the commandments.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Which ones?
segments.speaker: Rich Young Man

segments.text: Jesus replied,
'You shall not murder, you shall not commit adultery, you shall not steal, you shall not give false testimony,
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: honor your father and mother,' and 'love your neighbor as yourself.'
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: All these I have kept. What do I still lack?
segments.speaker: Rich Young Man

segments.text: Jesus answered,
If you want to be perfect, go, sell your possessions and give to the poor, and you will have treasure in heaven. Then come, follow me.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When the young man heard this, he went away sad, because he had great wealth.
Then Jesus said to his disciples,
Truly I tell you, it is hard for someone who is rich to enter the kingdom of heaven.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: Again I tell you, it is easier for a camel to go through the eye of a needle than for someone who is rich to enter the kingdom of God.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: When the disciples heard this, they were greatly astonished and asked,
Who then can be saved?
segments.speaker: Disciples

segments.text: Jesus looked at them and said,
With man this is impossible, but with God all things are possible.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: We have left everything to follow you! What then will there be for us?
segments.speaker: Peter

segments.text: Jesus said to them,
Truly I tell you, at the renewal of all things, when the Son of Man sits on his glorious throne, you who have followed me will also sit on twelve thrones, judging the twelve tribes of Israel.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: And everyone who has left houses or brothers or sisters or father or mother or wife or children or fields for my sake will receive a hundred times as much and will inherit eternal life.
segments.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: But many who are first will be last, and many who are last will be first.
segments.speaker: Jesus
